name: Wholesale Prices in Oligopolistic and Competitive Industries, 1965-73 (Eichner)

book_quotes.quote: Eichner (1973, 1187) presents data on the average price of concentrated and competitive industries, reproduced in figure 8.1, as evidence of the effect of price-setting due to oligopoly power.

Figure 8.1 Price Paths of Concentrated and Unconcentrated Industries
Source: Eichner 1973, 1187.
But this does not provide any evidence that the smoother prices of the concentrated industries are associated with a higher level of profitability or a higher trend rate of growth.

primary_source.publication: Eichner, Alfred S. (1973), 'A Theory of the Determination of the Mark-Up Under Oligopoly,' Economic Journal 83(332): 1184-1200
primary_source.table_or_series_id: Eichner 1973, p. 1187 (price-path chart for concentrated vs. competitive industries, 1965-73, base 1957-59=100)
primary_source.license: Copyrighted journal article (Wiley/RES); reproduce small extract under fair use for replication.
primary_source.replaced_by: BLS Producer Price Index (PPI) by industry; closest modern analog is PPI series for 'concentrated' vs. 'competitive' industries reconstructed from BLS PPI commodity and industry tables.

extension_candidates.subseries_label: BLS PPI by industry (NAICS) for high-CR vs low-CR industries
extension_candidates.source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, Producer Price Index Industry Data
extension_candidates.units: Index (base year varies; can rebase to 1957-59=100 via splice)
concerns: Industry classification has changed (SIC -> NAICS) since Eichner's 1973 sample; requires concordance.

Definition of 'concentrated' vs. 'competitive' set depends on Census Bureau Concentration Ratios (latest 2017 Economic Census Concentration Ratios table); CR thresholds (e.g., CR4 or CR8 > 50) must be re-applied.

extension_candidates.subseries_label: U.S. Census Bureau Concentration Ratios (industry-level CR4/CR8/CR20/CR50)
extension_candidates.source: U.S. Census Bureau, Concentration Ratios in Manufacturing (Economic Census)
extension_candidates.units: Percent of value of shipments by top N firms
concerns: Used to re-identify 'concentrated' vs. 'unconcentrated' industries for the modern PPI extension; not a price series itself.

methodology_notes: Shaikh reproduces Eichner's two price paths (concentrated and unconcentrated wholesale prices, monthly/annual index 1957-59=100) over 1965-1973. The chart spans the Nixon wage-price-control 'Phase I' and 'Phase II' periods, which are annotated in the figure.

The series is presented as part of Shaikh's empirical critique of the 'administered prices' hypothesis: he uses Eichner's own chart to argue the smoother prices of concentrated industries reflect higher fixed/entry costs (Stigler 1963, 70), not monopoly power.

The companion appendix file 'Appendix8_*' does not contain a digitized version of Figure 8.1 in ShaikhChoppedTables/ (only Figs 8.2-8.6 are tabulated). Underlying Eichner 1973 Table on p.1187 must be retrieved directly from the journal article for an exact replication.
Construction is 'direct': Shaikh reproduces Eichner's chart without further computation.
open_questions: The stub's predecessor_ids (cd_id S042, cd2_id S042) point to a CD2 series titled 'US Long-Run Interest Rates and Prices' which is actually a Chapter 10 series. There is no genuine CD2 dossier for this Chapter 8 figure; cd2_id was nulled.
The numeric data for Figure 8.1 is not in the ShaikhChoppedTables/ Appendix8_* files; it must be re-extracted from Eichner (1973) Economic Journal p.1187.
The exact list of industries in Eichner's 'concentrated' and 'competitive' aggregates must be obtained from Eichner 1973 to allow a modern BLS PPI extension.

B6 RESOLVED 2026-05-18 as data_unavailable: Eichner 1973 Fig 8.1 has no underlying table in the source publication, and Shaikh did not transcribe values in his narrative. WebPlotDigitizer required, or BLS PPI reconstruction via Phase 6 proxy approval.

review_history.notes: Filled from book pp.371-372 and Eichner 1973 source citation. Corrected stub name (was incorrectly labeled 'US Long-Run Interest Rates and Prices' from a stale CD2 mapping). No formal Appendix 8 exists in the book (appendices skip from 7.1 to 9.1).

B6 BLOCKER RESOLUTION: data_unavailable. Eichner (1973) p.1187 publishes only a chart (no underlying table) for the concentrated vs competitive wholesale-price indices 1965-1973. No Eichner 1973 PDF in RSCD workspace (searched Inputs/Capitalism Data/ and Technical/data/raw/01_SOURCE_MATERIALS/, no match). Shaikh's book pp.371-373 reproduces the chart but transcribes no numeric values from it. The Appendix8_*.xlsx ChoppedTables files do NOT contain Fig 8.1 data (only Figs 8.2-8.6 are tabulated). Verbatim reconstruction is not possible from any source available in the workspace; the only remaining path is manual WebPlotDigitizer extraction from the Economic Journal published chart (out of scope for this agent). S801 is BLOCKED for Phase 5 ingestion until either (a) the Eichner 1973 Economic Journal PDF is added to Inputs/ and a manual WebPlotDigitizer pass is performed, or (b) a BLS PPI reconstruction is approved as an extension_candidate (note: this would be an Anu Framework PROXY substitution since the underlying industry sets differ between Eichner's 1965-73 sample and modern NAICS PPI; would require Phase 6 approval).
